prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次依次约6038→6764→6757→12988→14083名，整体呈持续后移趋势，尤其2024年起位次大幅下滑，近两年累计后移约7300名；2025年基准 约14083名；该校在福建省物理类招生计划2021年10人、2022年12人、2023年11人、2024年8人、2025年17人；2026年计划大幅扩招至43人，较2025年增加 26人，增幅约153%，为近年最大扩招幅度，显著增加录取名额，竞争压力明显缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第53名，近年排名 稳中有升（2021年第46→2026年第53），属全国中上游水平；2026年声誉评价偏正面，主要涉及科研成果与终身学习正面事件；抖音热度排名第89、评价一般， 短视频平台曝光量中等；近年无显著投档断档记录；教育学A+（全国顶尖）、政治学A-、中国史A-、心理学A-、马克思主义理论A-，共5个A类学科，师范类学科 实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信类专业社会热度高热推荐，师范/教育类分化观望；福建省2026年物理类考生估算约20.4万人，较2025年19.2万人增 加约6.1%，考生规模扩大加剧竞争；2026年；华中师范大学位于湖北武汉，属中部地区，对福建考生有一定跨省吸引力；该校在福 建招生计划近年波动较大，2026年大幅扩招表明对福建生源的重视。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次约14083名、2026年招生计划大幅扩招153%是影响位次的最关键因素， 大幅增加录取名额将显著拉低位次（位次数字增大）；同时福建省物理类考生增加约6.1%及学校正面声誉对报考热度有微弱提升作用，部分抵消扩招效应。综合权衡后，预测2026 年物理类最低位次约26807名，区间26307–27307名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 数学类（含数学与应用数学英才班等）
- 计算机类（含计算机科学与技术、软件工程、信息安全）
- 心理学（双学士学位项目，心理学+人工智能）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 计算机类（含人工智能、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 遥感科学与技术
- 教育技术学（智能教育实验班）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 教育学类（含教育学、融合教育、特殊教育）
- 公共管理类（含行政管理、土地资源管理）

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年物理类预测位次约26807名，区间26307–27307名。建议位次在26000名以内的考生可重点冲刺一档数学类、计算机类等热门专业；位次在26800名左右的考生以二档专业为 主、一档为辅；位次在27500名以后的考生以三档专业保底，同时关注扩招带来的录取机会。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 6038 → 6764 → 6757 → 12988 → 14083, showing a continuous backward trend, especially a significant decline starting in 2024, with a cumulative backward shift of about 7300 positions in the last two years; the 2025 baseline is about 14083; the university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Fujian was 10 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 8 in 2024, and 17 in 2025; in 2026, the plan significantly expands to 43, an increase of 26 from 2025, an increase of about 153%, the largest expansion in recent years, significantly increasing admission slots and easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; ranked about 53rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, with stable and slightly rising rankings in recent years (46th in 2021 → 53rd in 2026), belonging to the upper-middle level nationally; the 2026 reputation evaluation is generally positive, mainly involving positive events in scientific research achievements and lifelong learning; Douyin popularity ranking is 89th, with average reviews, and moderate exposure on short video platforms; no significant record of admission gaps in recent years; Education is A+ (top nationally), Political Science A-, Chinese History A-, Psychology A-, Marxist Theory A-, with a total of 5 A-class disciplines, highlighting strong teacher-training disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication majors are highly recommended socially; Teacher-training/Education majors are divided and wait-and-see; the estimated number of Physics Category examinees in Fujian in 2026 is about 204,000, an increase of about 6.1% from 192,000 in 2025, intensifying competition due to the larger examinee pool; 2026; Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with some cross-provincial appeal to Fujian students; the university's enrollment plan in Fujian has fluctuated significantly in recent years, and the major expansion in 2026 indicates attention to Fujian students.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of about 14083 and the 2026 enrollment plan's major expansion of 153% as the most critical factor affecting rankings, the significant increase in admission slots will notably lower the ranking (ranking number increases); meanwhile, the 6.1% increase in Fujian Physics Category examinees and the university's positive reputation have a slight boosting effect on application popularity, partially offsetting the expansion effect. After comprehensive weighing, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 26807, with a range of 26307–27307.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics Elite Class, etc.)
- Computer Science (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Information Security)
- Psychology (Dual Bachelor's Degree Program, Psychology + Artificial Intelligence).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Computer Science (including Artificial Intelligence, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Remote Sensing Science and Technology
- Educational Technology (Intelligent Education Experimental Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Education (including Education, Integrated Education, Special Education)
- Public Administration (including Administrative Management, Land Resource Management)
- Information Management and Information Systems.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 26807, with a range of 26307–27307. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 26000 focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors such as Mathematics and Computer Science; candidates around ranking 26800 prioritize Tier 2 majors supplemented by Tier 1; candidates with rankings after 27500 use Tier 3 majors as safety options, while paying attention to admission opportunities brought by the expansion.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 1430 → 1398 → 1719 → 1096 → 986, showing a fluctuating but generally advancing trend, with the 2025 baseline at about 986, the highest in recent years. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Fujian Province was 13 in 2021, 18 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 8 in 2025. In 2026, the plan significantly expands to 26, an increase of 18 from 2025, approximately 225%, the largest expansion in recent years, substantially increasing admission slots.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Ranked approximately 53rd in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in recent years, placing it in the upper-middle tier nationally. The 2026 reputation evaluation is generally positive, mainly involving positive events in scientific research and lifelong learning. Douyin popularity ranking is 89th, with average reviews. No significant admission cutoff breaks in recent years. Education is A+ (top nationally), Chinese History A-, Political Science A-, Psychology A-, and Marxist Theory A-, totaling 5 A-class disciplines, with strong humanities and social sciences, highly attractive to History Category candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Chinese Language and Literature, Marxist Theory are socially recommended. Teacher/Education majors are differentiated and watched. In 2026, the estimated number of History Category candidates in Fujian Province is about 64,000, an increase of approximately 6.3% from 60,000 in 2025, intensifying competition. Central China Normal University is located in Wuhan, Hubei, in the central region, with some cross-provincial appeal to Fujian candidates. The significant expansion in 2026 indicates emphasis on Fujian student sources.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of about 986 and the 2026 enrollment plan's massive 225% expansion as the most critical factor, the substantial increase in admission slots will significantly lower the ranking (increase the ranking number). Meanwhile, the 6.3% increase in Fujian History Category candidates and the university's positive reputation have a slight boosting effect on application popularity. After weighing, the predicted 2026 minimum ranking for History Category is approximately 2287, with a range of 1875–2699.
